raw_response: Given your price sensitivity and budget constraints, the Baseus 65W charger is an excellent value choice. It offers two USB-C ports and one USB-A port for versatile charging needs across multiple devices. Its compact foldable design makes it travel-friendly, and its GaN technology ensures efficient power delivery despite some users reporting minor issues with fast-charging compatibility on certain laptops. This charger balances affordability and functionality well within your budget.
